overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic urban outdoor dining district in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning on a wooden balcony, proceeding through sunlit café terraces with distinctive purple-lit furniture, transitioning through a covered glass walkway, and ending with an abrupt cut to a night scene looking up at neon-lit skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden balcony overlooking outdoor dining terrace

agents.ego_description: standing on a wooden balcony, observing the outdoor café area below and a woman smoking nearby

notable_agents.action: woman in leopard print dress leaning on railing, smoking a cigarette and checking her phone

black metal safety railing with wooden handrail

vibrant purple and blue food stand with illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a wooden balcony deck with a woman in a leopard print dress smoking while leaning against a black railing. Large planters with green foliage line the edge, while white umbrellas and a purple food kiosk are visible in the distance across a paved terrace.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air café terrace with umbrella-shaded seating

events.description: steps off wooden balcony onto paved café terrace with white umbrellas

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the outdoor café, passing tables with distinctive glowing purple cylindrical lights

notable_agents.action: woman wearing a yellow sunhat sitting at a table under a white umbrella
person standing near a yellow vending booth structure

entered.detail: circular black tables with glowing purple cylindrical light fixtures underneath
bright yellow and green automated vending structure
light gray smooth concrete terrace flooring

segments.scene_description: Moving from the balcony onto a sunlit concrete terrace filled with white umbrellas shading black tables. Each table features distinctive glowing purple lights underneath. A woman in a yellow hat sits at a table to the left, while a yellow vending booth stands in the distance to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with glass canopy and integrated seating

events.description: enters covered area with glass roof and wooden decking, surrounded by dense vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded covered walkway, passing a person with green hair working at a table

notable_agents.action: person with bright green hair and cybernetic implants sitting at a table working on electronic components

entered.detail: transparent glass panel roof supported by black metal framework
thick mature tree trunk rising through the deck area
large rectangular white planter with ornamental grasses
tall dense green hedge forming a natural wall

segments.scene_description: The path leads into a sheltered walkway with a glass canopy overhead and wooden decking underfoot. Mature trees and dense hedges create a garden atmosphere. A person with green hair sits at a table working on electronics as the camera passes by white planters and glass railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk street between towering skyscrapers at night

events.description: abrupt cut from day café to night urban canyon with towering buildings
camera tilts upward to reveal illuminated building facades and glowing neon signage

agents.ego_description: standing in a narrow street looking up at the towering cyberpunk architecture and neon lights

entered.detail: tall building with green-tinted glass windows and red structural framework
dark brutalist building with yellow neon trim and industrial details
glowing yellow neon text reading FF:06:B5 on building facade
large illuminated digital screen visible between the buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene abruptly shifts to night in a narrow urban canyon between massive cyberpunk skyscrapers. The camera looks upward at towering buildings illuminated by green and yellow neon lights, with the distinctive glowing text 'FF:06:B5' visible on the right building and digital billboards visible overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a private wooden balcony out into a bright, expansive urban dining terrace. It begins on a wooden deck where a woman in a leopard print dress smokes against a black railing, surrounded by large green planters. As the camera moves forward, the perspective shifts from the balcony onto a sunlit concrete terrace characterized by a series of white umbrellas. The scene then expands to reveal black tables illuminated by distinctive glowing purple lights underneath, passing a woman in a yellow hat on the left before opening up toward a yellow vending booth in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a serene, sheltered garden walkway into a towering, neon-lit urban canyon at night. It begins by gliding along wooden decking beneath a glass canopy, passing through a lush environment of mature trees, dense hedges, and white planters. As the camera moves forward, it passes a person with green hair working on electronics beside a glass railing. The scene then shifts abruptly from the daylight garden to a narrow nocturnal corridor between massive cyberpunk skyscrapers. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal towering buildings illuminated by green and yellow neon lights, featuring digital billboards and the glowing text FF:06:B5.
